mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permissions (permission_code, permission_name, description,parent_id) VALUES (#{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{description},#{parentId});
mapper.update: UPDATE permissions SET permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM permissions ORDER BY permission_code
SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM roles r JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.permission_code

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.permission_code

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.permission_code
